message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle stickfigure

package "Application Layer" as app {
  actor User
  component ["SubscriptionController" as controller] as controller
}

package "Domain Model Layer" as domain {
  component ["SubscriptionServiceImpl" as service] as service
}

package "Infrastructure Layer" as infra {
  component ["JpaSubscriptionRepository" as repo] as repo
  component ["SubscriptionPersistenceJpaRepository" as persistence] as persistence
}

database "Datastore" as datastore1
database "Datastore" as datastore2

User -> controller : 
activate controller
controller -> service : via SubscriptionService
activate service
service -> repo : via SubscriptionRepository
activate repo
repo -> persistence : via Spring data repository
activate persistence
persistence -> datastore1 : 
activate datastore1
deactivate datastore1
deactivate persistence
deactivate repo
service -> controller : 
deactivate service
controller -> User : 
deactivate controller

User -> controller : 
activate controller
controller -> service : via SubscriptionService
activate service
service -> repo : via SubscriptionRepository
activate repo
repo -> persistence : via Spring data repository
activate persistence
persistence -> datastore2 : 
activate datastore2
deactivate datastore2
deactivate persistence
deactivate repo
service -> controller : 
deactivate service
controller -> User : 
deactivate controller

@enduml
